title: diplazium macrotis
intro: Diplazium macrotis, also known as the large-lobed umbrella fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema. The health benefits of Diplazium macrotis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
